original_statement: what is the average diameter of all the coins composed of bronze?
mutated_statement: what is the average size of all the things composed of some material?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Attribute generalization + Material vagueness: 'coins' → 'things' (coins→things) | 'diameter' → 'size' (diameter→size) | 'bronze' → 'some material' (bronze→some material)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述：“The question asks for the average size (diameter) of all items with a listed composition, which applies to all six rows...”，Agent直接将“size”解释为直径并对6个数值求平均，且在解释中使用具体数值与取中点(32.5 mm)。日志中没有出现任何表示不确定、模糊或请求澄清的词汇，也未提及“things”“some material”带来的广义或歧义，因此Agent未识别到问题模糊性，而是按自己的假设直接计算并给出具体答案，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
